meaning: n.不信上帝者,异教徒,野蛮人,粗野的人adj.异教的,野蛮的
examples: Declare his glory among the heathen, his wonders among all people.
Declare his glory among the heathen; his marvellous works among all nations.
Thou makest us a byword among the heathen, a shaking of the head among the people.
His 2002 album Heathen saw him collaborate with Tony Visconti, one of his producers from his 1970s glory days.
Personally, I wouldn't say I'm a golden-calf heathen, but I'm not exactly spending my evenings shouting "hallelujah" at regular intervals, either.
